race.comment: ROYAL HONOUR (3) was beaten at $1.30 on resumption but bumped into a handy one there, still putting good margins on the rest of the field. Happy to give him another chance second up and drawn to sit on speed in what looks a fairly thin race. DOUBT IT'S LOVE (5) wasn't far away on wet ground here last time in an improved effort. She's a big price for exotics. MACCA'S ANGEL (8) resumes for her second campaign having been okay in three runs last time in. She wouldn't surprise. KELLERSLEA (7) is a filly by North Pacific on debut for the Hayes yard who can run well, as can POLAR EYES (10) for the Stokes yard on her home track.
